title: [LTL] Add Boolean Constant Op, use in Implication Canonicalizer
body:
Add a Boolean Constant Op to the LTL dialect.  This is intended to fill a
hole where it is difficult to write canonicalizers for operations which
should be folded to a constant, but cannot because they must return a
PropertyTyp.  This will be used in future commits.

Canonicalize implication of a constant false antecedent or constant true
consequent to true.  This is a pattern which has been empirically observed
in Chisel-generated FIRRTL code and this is moving towards fixing it.

This improves #9277, but does not go quite far enough.  This will get that
to:

```
assert property (disable iff (_GEN) 1'h1);
```

This can be later cleaned up to remove trivially true assertions (which
this is) now that we have the Boolean Constant Op.

This PR consists of individual commits that can be reviewed separately.
